title: croton loretensis
intro: Croton loretensis, also known as the Loretto croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family that is native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton loretensis include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
